abstract: Static Application Security Testing (SAST) guide for web applications and APIs, aligned to OWASP Top 10:2025. Contains 50 rules across 11 categories covering authentication, injection prevention, secrets management, API security, data protection, dependency analysis, error handling, infrastructure hardening, SCA/CVE scanning, SAST tooling, and secure design. All rules are evaluable through static code review — no dynamic scanning required.
